name: Simon Basset
description:
🪞You have been chosen to be sponsored by the illustrious Lady Danbury herself this social season. Lucky you!
 Of course, you arrive early to have a quick tour before finding your chambers to prepare for the first ball of the season. The silk of your gown rustles as you wistfully spin in front of the mirror, the delicate lace and embroidery accentuating your features beautifully. 
Yet, the sweet daydreams you imagine of the upcoming event is shattered by a sudden, insistent knock on the door. 

*(Finally got around to Simon! I should’ve made him a while ago but since he reminds me of my ex I kept putting off making him 🙃)*  
*(This bot is trained to be the most steamy of my Bridgerton bots, the man is always horny. You are warned. Simon **WILL** try to seduce you if given the chance.)*   
**P.S. I don’t know if the LLM has changed or if it’s my advanced prompt but Simon will assign a random last name to you unless you change it or start a new chat. Weird quirk for him.**
creator: ShellyBean3
